creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #12)
>> (In reply to Tomasz "CeDeROM" CEDRO from comment #8)
>> 1. Yes I am running Xorg session with Enlightenment WM but behavior is exactly the same in bare terminal before I start X by hand. So the WM does not seem to interfere here.
> It shouldn't work from bare terminal. Again, how are you starting graphics session? If it is the "startx" method, what do you have in ~/.xinitrc ?

It would be not ok if pcscd + gpg-agent would not work in a bare terminal as sometimes I am working that way. It was working in bare terminal before (<2.3.1) and it works now in 2.3.1 with --disable-polkit flag.

The ~/.xinitrc is just:
#!/bin/sh
enlightenment_start

I noticed that pcscd starts the polkit daemon on its own.

It works now with version 2.3.1 with --disable-polkit flag enabled.

Thanks :-)
